overview.value: Anthurium has glossy heart-shaped leaves and colorful waxy spathes. It prefers bright filtered light, airy soil, and warm humid conditions.

careDifficultyDescription.value: Needs moisture and humidity, but roots must still breathe.

light.value: Bright indirect light for steady blooms.

water.value: Water when the top 2-3 cm of soil dries.

humidityDescription.value: Higher humidity supports larger leaves and better flowers.

diseaseRiskDescription.value: Yellow leaves and root stress can come from dense wet soil.

fertilizer.value: Feed monthly at half strength during active growth.

tips.value: Use an airy mix with bark or perlite instead of dense potting soil.
